name: Balwin Properties Limited
summary: Balwin Properties Limited develops and sells residential properties in the low-to-middle market segments in South Africa. The company offers sectional title apartments. It also operates as a network infrastructure provider of electronic communication services; and rents electronic communication products. The company was formerly known as Balwin Properties Proprietary Limited. Balwin Properties Limited was founded in 1996 and is based in Johannesburg, South Africa.
